scripts.build: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run build:worker && pnpm run build:content && pnpm run build:background
scripts.check:pfp: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; uv run python scripts/check_pfp_url.py "$@"' --
scripts.download:avatars: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; uv run python scripts/download_avatar_catalog.py "$@"' --
scripts.export:classifier: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; uv run python scripts/export_classifier_onnx.py "$@"' --
scripts.ingest:avatars: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; uv run python scripts/ingest_avatar_exports.py "$@"' --
scripts.label:heuristic: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; uv run python scripts/label_heuristic_matches.py "$@"' --
scripts.prepare:assets: pnpm run download:images && pnpm run generate:model
scripts.review:avatars: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; uv run python scripts/review_avatars.py "$@"' --
scripts.score:classifier: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; uv run python scripts/score_avatar_catalog.py "$@"' --
scripts.train:classifier: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; uv run python scripts/train_classifier.py "$@"' --
scripts.build:dataset: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; uv run python scripts/build_training_dataset.py "$@"' --
